root.npcLine: Careful, I've got a board half-wired on the bench. What can I help with?

choices.playerText: Which comms protocols do you work with?
How do you debug embedded issues?

stack.npcLine: C and Embedded C mostly, targeting MCUs like the XMC4800 and STM32 families.

comms.npcLine: CAN and RS485 for the physical layer, Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP on top depending on the system.

debugging.npcLine: Logic analyzer first, then a debugger session if the timing looks suspicious. Try the workstation over there — it runs a small build/flash/GPIO demo.
